description:
You are an OLPC field technician visiting a school to audit deployed laptops. Generate a system inventory report for this machine and save it to /home/ga/Documents/system_inventory.txt. The report must contain four sections with the following exact headings and content:

=== SYSTEM INFO ===
Include the system hostname, Linux kernel version, and total system RAM.

=== SUGAR ACTIVITIES ===
Include a list of installed Sugar activity names and a line containing the word 'Total' with the count of activities.

=== DISK USAGE ===
Include human-readable disk usage for the root (/) filesystem, showing size, used, and available space.

=== SUGAR USER CONFIG ===
Include the current Sugar nickname and XO icon color.
